---
title: "Combining Data"
---


```{r, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>"
)
```


---
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{Combining Data}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

<style>
.nobullet li{
  list-style-type: none;
}
</style>

![](hypo_logo.png)


## Introduction
